summary: Verified retro TV bug fixes on hero. 'Thoroughbred' text no longer appears on/around the TV, and the TV is positioned top-right beside the headline. All regressions pass.

issues: TV right edge sits ~220px from viewport right edge (spec asked for ~120px). TV still visually hugs the right side of the content container due to page horizontal padding; not a functional blocker but slightly less flush than the spec requested.

REGRESSION1_image_cycling.img2_after_4s: different image observed in screenshot (banana crate)

REGRESSION4_pillars_line.text: Clear Communication · Great Quality / Right Price · Timely Deliverance.

action_items: Optional: reduce right-side padding/margin on the TV column so TV.right sits within ~120px of the viewport (currently 220px). Consider removing container padding on the right for the TV column or increasing TV width so it hugs the right edge more tightly. Not a blocker — TV is clearly right-aligned beside the headline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bugs (Thoroughbred text on TV + TV placement) are fixed. TV innerText only contains 'LIVE' and 'NOW BROADCASTING · SHIPMENTS IN MOTION'. TV.top == headline.top (208px), TV is right of headline. Only minor deviation: TV.right is 220px from viewport right edge (spec wanted ~120px).
